title: Domain Dictionary Schema
description: Schema for industry-specific abbreviation and matching dictionaries with geographic entity resolution support

detectionPatterns.description: Patterns used to auto-detect this domain from data

entityTypes.description: Salesforce/HubSpot object types associated with this domain

fieldPatterns.description: Field name patterns that suggest this domain

additionalProperties.description: Category of abbreviations (e.g., organizations, roles, regulatory)

ignoreCase.description: Whether to ignore case during matching

expandBeforeMatch.description: Whether to expand abbreviations before fuzzy matching

minimumConfidence.description: Minimum confidence score to consider a match

matchingPolicy.description: Market-specific policies for geographic entity resolution

sameNameDifferentStatePolicy.description: How to handle entities with same name but different states. BLOCK=reject, REVIEW=manual, ALLOW=auto-merge, ALLOW_WITH_PATTERN=merge if location pattern detected

uniquenessLevel.description: How unique entity names typically are in this market. HIGH=names usually distinct (government), LOW=names often shared (franchises)

confidenceThresholds.description: Confidence score thresholds for tiered decisions

tag.description: Minimum score for tagging as potential match

stateMismatchPenalty.description: Score penalty when states don't match (market-dependent)

genericEntityPatterns.description: Glob patterns for generic entity names that require location disambiguation (e.g., 'City of *', '* Hospital')

sameEntitySignals.description: Signals used to determine if two records represent the same entity

required.description: Signals that MUST match for same-entity determination (e.g., 'state_match' for government)

boosts.description: Signals that increase confidence when present (e.g., 'domain_match', 'phone_area_match')

knownEntities.description: List of known multi-location entities (franchises, chains) where same name in different states IS the same entity

locationPatterns.description: Regex patterns to detect location suffixes in entity names

baseGroup.description: Capture group index for the base entity name

locationGroup.description: Capture group index for the location identifier

storeNumberGroup.description: Capture group index for store/location number (if applicable)
